message:
feat(ipc): tick 193 shutdown_signal_pending_with_cx outer timeout uses timeout_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

shutdown_signal_pending_with_cx (ipc.rs L1130) accepts an explicit
`cx: &crate::cx::Cx` parameter and already threads it through the
inner `mpsc_recv_state_with_cx(shutdown_rx, cx)`. But the outer
`crate::runtime_compat::timeout(IPC_SHUTDOWN_POLL_INTERVAL, ...)`
was using the ambient timeout helper, which internally falls back
to `Cx::current()` thread-local lookup.

When this helper runs in a thread-local scope different from the
caller's explicit cx, the poll interval timer was bound to a
different cx than the recv future. Asymmetric cx ownership =
orphan hole under virtual time.

Tick 193 routes the outer timeout through
`crate::runtime_compat::timeout_with_cx(cx, ...)`. Now both the
timer and the recv future honor the caller's explicit cx.

Same pattern as tick 192 (run_with_context_with_cx accept poll).
Completes the cx-first sweep of ipc.rs server-side entry points.

Verification: 98 / 98 ipc:: tests pass under
--features asupersync-runtime via fork bypass, including
ipc_server_run_with_cx_exits_cleanly_on_shutdown and
shutdown_signal_pending_with_cx_ignores_cancelled_receive.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1131,7 +1131,15 @@ async fn shutdown_signal_pending_with_cx(
     shutdown_rx: &mut mpsc::Receiver<()>,
     cx: &crate::cx::Cx,
 ) -> bool {
-    match crate::runtime_compat::timeout(
+    // Tick 193 (ft-xbnl0.2.3): outer timeout now bound to the caller's
+    // cx via timeout_with_cx. Previously used ambient `timeout` which
+    // falls back to `Cx::current()` thread-local — orphan hole whenever
+    // this helper runs in a thread-local scope different from the
+    // caller's explicit cx. The inner mpsc_recv_state_with_cx already
+    // threads cx, so with this fix both the recv future AND the poll
+    // interval timer honor the caller's cx.
+    match crate::runtime_compat::timeout_with_cx(
+        cx,
         IPC_SHUTDOWN_POLL_INTERVAL,
         mpsc_recv_state_with_cx(shutdown_rx, cx),
     )
